message:
Add scheduler pure function tests (71.3% → 81.6%)

47 table-driven parallel tests covering:
- SpawnJob: SetError, TotalDuration, QueueDuration, ExecutionDuration, Clone
- JobQueue: Peek, Get, ListAll, ListBySession/Batch, CountBySession/Batch,
  Clear, CancelBatch, Stats, Enqueue update, edge cases
- FairScheduler: RunningCount, Queue, MultiSession fairness
- RateLimiter: SetRate, SetCapacity, SetMinInterval, Reset, AvailableTokens,
  Waiting, Stats, TimeUntilNextToken, invalid config handling
- FormatETA: 9 duration formatting cases
- Progress.JSON, ProgressBroadcaster subscribe/broadcast
- AgentCaps: GetAvailable, Reset, GlobalCapExceeded, RecordSuccess
- Config defaults, jobHeap.Less priority ordering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
